message:
refactor(runtime): Consolidate equality comparison duplicates

Remove redundant equality_ops.zig and simplify equality_helpers.zig:

- Delete equality_ops.zig (85 lines) - equalViaPyValue/equalAny were
  duplicate wrappers for PyValue.from().eql() already in pythonEql
- Replace 3 usages of equality_ops.equalViaPyValue with pythonEql
- Replace duplicate elemEql function with alias to pythonEql

Both pythonEql and elemEql did the exact same thing:
  return PyValue.from(a).eql(PyValue.from(b))

Net savings: ~90 lines of duplicate code.
